nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 北地大区
nodes.summary: 北地大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-crowned parakeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Red-crowned parakeet
nodes.summary: Red-crowned parakeet（Red-crowned parakeet，学名 Cyanoramphus novaezelandiae），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于北地大区、科罗曼德尔半岛，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括外来捕食者。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 科罗曼德尔半岛
nodes.summary: 科罗曼德尔半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-crowned parakeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: On the mainland, this species occurs in large forest blocks in Northland, Coromandel and central North Island

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: On the mainland, this species occurs in large forest blocks in Northland, Coromandel and central North Island

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Red-crowned parakeets can live in a wide variety of habitats including dense temperate rainforests, coastal forests, scrubland, forest edges and open areas.Marchant, S., Higgins, P

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It used to be classified as near threatened as invasive predators had pushed it out of its historical range but it is now at least concern
